title: Where influence happens 🌐, TikTok ad decay 📉, AI toolkit for growth work 🧰
rawText:

 STEAL THESE STRATEGIES (AND GET A $1000 AD CREDIT WHEN YOU SPEND

 Reddit is where the "final check" happens before a purchase is made.
By joining these high-intent conversations, brands tap into an

READY TO START? Spend $1,000 and get a $1,000 ad credit using code

*New accounts only, limit 1 per account, additional terms apply [8].

📱 

NEWS & TRENDS

 INFLUENCE HAPPENS EVERYWHERE, AN ANALYSIS OF THE 5,000 MOST-VISITED
SITES ON MOBILE AND DESKTOP WEB (4 MINUTE READ) [9] 

 Influence is spread across many channels, with search and social
making up nearly half of all visits. Google dominates, drawing as much
traffic as the next 13 sites combined, while AI tools account for only
about 0.1% of usage. The data suggests most influence happens across
fragmented platforms, and search mainly captures and converts demand
rather than creating it. 

 PERFORMANCE MARKETING IN 2026: THE TOP 6 TRENDS SHAPING HOW BRANDS
GROW (10 MINUTE READ) [10] 

 AI campaign tools like Performance Max and Advantage+ are now
baseline, but teams that defer entirely to algorithms risk optimizing
for the wrong signals, such as hitting CPA targets while flooding CRMs
with low-quality leads. Creative has become the main differentiator on
paid social since targeting capabilities have converged across
advertisers. Meanwhile, retail media is growing rapidly through
first-party transaction data, AEO is restructuring organic search as
AI Overviews cover 55% of queries, and B2B marketers are shifting
toward demand generation as buyers complete most of their journey
independently. 

🚀 

STRATEGIES & TACTICS

 HOW AN ALARM APP GOT 25 MILLION VIEWS AND 100K DOWNLOADS IN 30 DAYS
(4 MINUTE READ) [11] 

 Wayk, a morning alarm app that forces users to complete tasks like
pushups or photos before it turns off, reached 100K downloads and the
#15 spot on the App Store within 30 days. The growth came almost
entirely from TikTok, where the team adapted proven short-form formats
from adjacent productivity apps instead of inventing new content
styles. Each video followed a repeatable structure of a relatable
caption paired with a raw, unpolished reaction to the product. Reddit
and X failed to generate traction, reinforcing that for small consumer
app teams, short-form video is currently the dominant distribution
channel. 

 TIKTOK AD CREATIVE HAS A SHORTER SHELF LIFE (4 MINUTE READ) [12] 

 TikTok ads experience creative fatigue faster than other platforms
due to the algorithm's preference for high-velocity novelty and
entertainment-focused consumption patterns. Advertisers should treat
creative development like a supply chain with modular components,
filming multiple hooks, body segments, and CTAs that can generate 60
ad permutations from one hour of shooting. The hook fatigues fastest
and should be swapped when thumb-stop rates drop below benchmarks for
three consecutive days, while keeping successful body and CTA elements
intact. 

🧑‍💻 

RESOURCES & TOOLS

 YOUR HEAD OF GROWTH TOOLKIT (WITH CONTEXT, PROMPTS, AND AGENTS) (17
MINUTE READ) [13] 

 A structured AI agent system can replace inconsistent growth work by
running weekly audits, experiments, and prioritization in under an
hour. The toolkit includes instant prompts that generate a full audit
in 60 seconds and a 3 month roadmap in minutes, which replicates work
that normally takes 2 to 3 hours. Small gains compound over time,
since a 2% improvement in conversion can decide whether a company
misses its annual target by 20%. AI-driven teams already see 42% more
content output and 27% higher conversion rates, and this system
increases testing velocity from about 1 experiment per month to 3 to 5
per week. The system is designed to help founders focus on decisions
while maintaining consistent growth execution. 

 KLAVIYO JUST SHIPPED ITS BIGGEST AI RELEASE YET (4 MINUTE READ) [14] 

 Klaviyo released a major AI update headlined by Composer, an agent
that builds full campaigns from a single plain-language prompt. It
determines aud
